---
pagetitle: "News"
css: ../../assets/styles/blog.css
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  image-align: right
  image-height: 120px
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [title, date, categories, description, image]
---

# News
Latest updates from FruitMeasureApp, including releases, research progress, and field testing.
